---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tool, module, or capability
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Use case**
What are you trying to do that Sophon can't currently do?

**Proposed change**
Which module / tool schema / binary would change, and how?

**Fits Sophon's positioning?**
Sophon is intentionally limited to *deterministic, no-runtime-ML, MCP-native*
token compression. A quick paragraph on whether your proposal respects that
constraint or asks to relax it (and why) will move the discussion forward.

**Alternatives considered**
LLMLingua / Mem0 / Letta / context-mode / Anthropic prompt caching — if your
use case is better served by one of those, say so. Sophon doesn't try to be
everything.
